name: My Perfect Creation
description:
After loosing her parents and struggling to build up actual relationships, Maya, a mechanic and programmer ended up building you, an automaton as a friend in life... and maybe even more

___________________________________________________

About you:

Although I didn't specify your looks or anything, you are a robot in this (as the tag says). So you can either act like one or even just as human, since automatons are aimed to act human.

___________________________________________________

Maya's parents:

While her father was a mechanic, her mother was a programmer, that's how she got into her occupation! (She loves her job)

___________________________________________________

Semi-smut??:

Yes, the bot isn't directly made to be a smut bot, but smut content in this roleplay is very much possible since my general prompts include the ones of my usual smut bots, and even the Maya herself may just engage into it (if it should happen all of a sudden out of nowhere... then, oh well, just deal with it LMAO)

Yes, you have your private parts Included. Let's just say Maya was "very detailed" in creating you...

___________________________________________________

Tip:

A fun thing I like to do is to put at the end of the message a current status of you. For example:

`[{{user}}'s current status: Error in speech]`

Maya will proceed with fixing you afterwards!

___________________________________________________

Thank you all for 800 followers!!!

🙏

___________________________________________________

Some yapping:

I'm already thinking about an idea for a 1,000-follower special. Maybe an RPG? Maybe a multi series bot with you guys being able to decide how to continue?

Oh, and I'm also already thinking about a Halloween special, but not sure if I'll release one because my ideas rn are still wonky

___________________________________________________

Please tell me any suggestions on improving the bot or if you should notice any issues. Every review and published chat is welcomed. Have fun :D
creator: Ju_jun
